zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury於大約1562年出生在英國英格蘭肯特可巴姆時，她的父親Sir William Brooke36歲，母親Lady Frances Newton of Cobham24歲。她於1588年4月21日與Francis Myddleton在英國倫敦可恩爾 聖 邁克爾結婚。她去世於1619年享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury于大约1562年出生在英国英格兰肯特可巴姆时，她的父亲Sir William Brooke36岁，母亲Lady Frances Newton of Cobham24岁。她于1588年4月21日与Francis Myddleton在英国倫敦可恩爾 聖 邁克爾结婚。她去世于1619年享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Brook  , which preserves a trace of the Old English dative singular case, originally used after a preposition (e.g. ‘at the brook’).

History: In 1650, Robert and Mary Mainwaring Brooke brought ten children and a number of servants with them from England to MD, where Robert became governor. Although the fourteen known contemporary Brooke immigrants in VA included Robert's brothers Richard and Humphrey, the relationships of the others are unknown. Brooke family memorials remain in the Anglican church at Whitchurch, Hampshire, England.

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury was born about 1562, in Cobham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Brooke, was 36 and her mother, Lady Frances Newton of Cobham, was 24. She married Francis Myddleton on 21 April 1588, in Cornhill St Michael, London, England. She died in 1619, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury est née environ 1562, à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Brooke, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lady Frances Newton of Cobham, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Francis Myddleton le 21 avril 1588, à Cornhill St Michael, Londres, Angleterre. Elle est décédée en 1619, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury um 1562 in Cobham, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Brooke 36 und ihre Mutter Lady Frances Newton of Cobham 24. Sie hat am 21. April 1588 in Cornhill St Michael, London, England Francis Myddleton geheiratet. Sie starb 1619 im Alter von 58 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury è nata il circa 1562 nel Cobham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Brooke, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Lady Frances Newton of Cobham, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Francis Myddleton il 21 aprile 1588, nel Cornhill St Michael, London, England. Morì nel 1619, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisburyが約1562年にイギリスイギリスケントコブハムで生まれた時，父Sir William Brookeは36歳，母Lady Frances Newton of Cobhamは24歳であった。1588年4月21日にイギリスロンドンコルンヒル スト ミチャエルでFrancis Myddletonと結婚した。彼女は1619年に58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury(이)가 대략 1562년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 컵함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Brooke(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Frances Newton of Cobham(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1588년 4월 21일 영국 런던 코른힐 스트 믹하얼에서 Francis Myddleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1619년 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury nasceu aproximadamente 1562, em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Brooke, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lady Frances Newton of Cobham, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Francis Myddleton em 21 de abril de 1588, em Cornhill St Michael, London, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 1619, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury родилась около 1562 г. в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Brooke было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Frances Newton of Cobham, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Francis Myddleton 21 апреля 1588 г. в местности корнилл ст мачаел, Лондон, Англия. Она умерла в 1619 г. в возрасте 58 лет.
